section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of several bulging discs and a history of infertility.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history elements are typically documented in the subjective/history portion rather than in the assessment, which should focus on diagnostic impressions and active problem synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has had a gall bladder removed and a pcl surgery.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Prior surgeries are part of past medical/surgical history and fit better in the subjective/history section than in the assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has had infertility treatment.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past treatment history, which belongs in the subjective/history section rather than in the assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is allergic to percocet, vicodin and regulin.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Allergies are part of the patient's reported history and are usually documented with subjective/history data, not in the assessment section.
